description: Flink 专有术语库 (v4.0国际化)

terms.definition: Flink集群的主控节点，负责协调分布式执行
terms.definition_en: The master node of a Flink cluster responsible for coordinating distributed execution

usage_examples.zh: JobManager负责调度任务和协调检查点
usage_examples.en: The JobManager is responsible for scheduling tasks and coordinating checkpoints

terms.definition: Flink集群的工作节点，负责执行具体任务
terms.definition_en: The worker node of a Flink cluster responsible for executing tasks

usage_examples.zh: TaskManager包含多个任务槽位
usage_examples.en: A TaskManager contains multiple task slots

terms.definition: TaskManager中资源分配的基本单位
terms.definition_en: The basic unit of resource allocation in a TaskManager
terms.notes: Slot单独使用时可保留英文

usage_examples.zh: 每个任务槽可以运行一个任务链
usage_examples.en: Each Task Slot can run one task chain

terms.definition: 算子或任务的并行执行实例数量
terms.definition_en: The number of parallel instances for an operator or task

usage_examples.zh: 增加并行度可以提高吞吐量
usage_examples.en: Increasing Parallelism can improve throughput

terms.definition: 将多个算子融合为单个任务执行的优化机制
terms.definition_en: An optimization mechanism that fuses multiple operators into a single task

usage_examples.zh: 算子链减少了线程间通信开销
usage_examples.en: Operator Chaining reduces inter-thread communication overhead

terms.definition: 触发检查点的特殊事件，用于对齐流分区
terms.definition_en: A special event that triggers checkpoints and aligns stream partitions

usage_examples.zh: Barrier在源头注入并随流传播
usage_examples.en: Barriers are injected at the source and propagate through the stream

terms.definition: 算子收到所有输入通道的Barrier后才触发快照的检查点模式
terms.definition_en: Checkpoint mode where snapshot is triggered after receiving Barriers from all input channels

usage_examples.zh: 对齐检查点保证一致性但会增加延迟
usage_examples.en: Aligned Checkpoints guarantee consistency but increase latency

terms.definition: 无需等待所有Barrier到达即可触发快照的检查点模式
terms.definition_en: Checkpoint mode that triggers snapshots without waiting for all Barriers

usage_examples.zh: 非对齐检查点减少了反压时的检查点时间
usage_examples.en: Unaligned Checkpoints reduce checkpoint duration during backpressure

terms.definition: 仅持久化自上次检查点以来状态变更的检查点模式
terms.definition_en: Checkpoint mode that only persists state changes since the last checkpoint

usage_examples.zh: 递增检查点减少了存储和网络开销
usage_examples.en: Incremental Checkpoints reduce storage and network overhead

terms.definition: 用户触发的完整一致性快照，用于升级和迁移
terms.definition_en: A user-triggered fully consistent snapshot used for upgrades and migrations

usage_examples.zh: Savepoint允许在Flink版本间迁移状态
usage_examples.en: Savepoints allow state migration between Flink versions

terms.definition: 实现端到端恰好一次语义的分布式提交协议
terms.definition_en: A distributed commit protocol for achieving end-to-end exactly-once semantics

usage_examples.zh: Kafka Sink使用两阶段提交保证一致性
usage_examples.en: Kafka Sink uses Two-Phase Commit to ensure consistency

terms.definition: 在状态变更前先写入日志的持久化机制
terms.definition_en: A persistence mechanism that writes to log before state changes

usage_examples.zh: 预写日志确保状态更新不丢失
usage_examples.en: Write-Ahead Log ensures state updates are not lost

terms.definition: 将状态存储在TaskManager内存中的状态后端
terms.definition_en: A state backend that stores state in TaskManager memory

usage_examples.zh: MemoryStateBackend适合小状态和本地测试
usage_examples.en: MemoryStateBackend is suitable for small state and local testing

terms.definition: 将状态快照存储在文件系统中的状态后端
terms.definition_en: A state backend that stores state snapshots in a file system

usage_examples.zh: FsStateBackend将检查点写入HDFS或S3
usage_examples.en: FsStateBackend writes checkpoints to HDFS or S3

terms.definition: 使用RocksDB存储状态的状态后端，支持大状态
terms.definition_en: A state backend using RocksDB for storage, supporting large state

usage_examples.zh: RocksDBStateBackend支持TB级状态
usage_examples.en: RocksDBStateBackend supports terabyte-scale state

terms.definition: 与键值相关的分区状态
terms.definition_en: Partitioned state associated with keys

usage_examples.zh: 键控状态只能在KeyedStream上使用
usage_examples.en: Keyed State can only be used on KeyedStreams

terms.definition: 与算子实例绑定的非分区状态
terms.definition_en: Non-partitioned state bound to operator instances

usage_examples.zh: Kafka Source使用算子状态保存偏移量
usage_examples.en: Kafka Source uses Operator State to save offsets

terms.definition: 在所有算子实例间复制的特殊状态类型
terms.definition_en: A special state type replicated across all operator instances

usage_examples.zh: 广播状态适用于规则更新场景
usage_examples.en: Broadcast State is suitable for rule update scenarios

terms.definition: 状态项自动过期的配置机制
terms.definition_en: A configuration mechanism for automatic expiration of state entries

usage_examples.zh: 配置TTL可以自动清理过期状态
usage_examples.en: Configuring TTL enables automatic cleanup of expired state

terms.definition: Flink的底层流处理编程接口
terms.definition_en: Flink's low-level stream processing programming interface

usage_examples.zh: DataStream API提供最大的灵活性
usage_examples.en: DataStream API provides maximum flexibility

terms.definition: Flink的声明式关系型API
terms.definition_en: Flink's declarative relational API

usage_examples.zh: Table API是SQL和DataStream之间的桥梁
usage_examples.en: Table API is a bridge between SQL and DataStream

terms.definition: 从主流分离数据的辅助输出流
terms.definition_en: An auxiliary output stream that separates data from the main stream

usage_examples.zh: 侧输出可用于收集迟到的数据
usage_examples.en: Side Output can be used to collect late data

terms.definition: 提供对时间和状态细粒度控制的底层API
terms.definition_en: A low-level API providing fine-grained control over time and state

usage_examples.zh: ProcessFunction允许注册定时器
usage_examples.en: ProcessFunction allows registering timers

terms.definition: 允许并发外部系统查询的富集模式
terms.definition_en: An enrichment pattern that allows concurrent external system queries

usage_examples.zh: 异步I/O提高了外部查询的吞吐量
usage_examples.en: Async I/O improves throughput for external queries

terms.definition: 定义流处理使用的时间语义类型
terms.definition_en: Defines the type of time semantics used in stream processing

usage_examples.zh: Flink支持三种时间特征
usage_examples.en: Flink supports three Time Characteristics

terms.definition: 窗口计算中允许数据延迟到达的宽限时间
terms.definition_en: The grace period for late data arrival in windowed computations

usage_examples.zh: 允许延迟可以处理乱序事件
usage_examples.en: Allowed Lateness can handle out-of-order events

terms.definition: 生成水印的配置方式
terms.definition_en: The configuration method for generating watermarks

usage_examples.zh: WatermarkStrategy定义了水印的生成方式
usage_examples.en: WatermarkStrategy defines how watermarks are generated

terms.definition: 分区被标记为空闲前无数据的时间
terms.definition_en: The time before a partition is marked as idle with no data

usage_examples.zh: 空闲超时防止水印停滞
usage_examples.en: Idleness Timeout prevents watermark stalling

terms.definition: 根据工作负载动态调整资源的调度器
terms.definition_en: A scheduler that dynamically adjusts resources based on workload

usage_examples.zh: 自适应调度器可以自动扩缩容
usage_examples.en: The Adaptive Scheduler can auto-scale

terms.definition: Flink 2.0+基于资源需求的资源分配模式
terms.definition_en: Flink 2.0+ resource allocation mode based on resource requirements

usage_examples.zh: 声明式资源管理简化了资源配置
usage_examples.en: Declarative Resource Management simplifies resource configuration
